info.title: Microsoft Graph API - Teams Endpoints
info.description: Microsoft Teams endpoints within the Microsoft Graph API v1.0. Provides access to teams, channels, messages, members, tabs, installed apps, chats, calls, and meetings. All Teams resources are accessed through the Microsoft Graph REST API at graph.microsoft.com/v1.0.

get.description: List all teams in an organization. Supports $filter, $select, $top, $skiptoken, and $count OData query parameters.

202.description: Accepted. Team creation is async. Check the Location header for the operation URL.

get.description: Retrieve the properties and relationships of the specified team.

patch.description: Update the properties of the specified team.

delete.description: Delete a team and its associated group.

post.description: Archive the specified team. When archived, users can no longer make most changes to the team.
Create a copy of a team. You can specify which parts to clone: apps, channels, members, settings.

202.description: Accepted. Cloning is a long-running operation.

get.description: Retrieve the list of channels in a team.

post.description: Create a new channel in a team. Maximum displayName length is 50 characters.

get.description: Retrieve the properties of a channel.

patch.description: Update the properties of a channel.

delete.description: Delete a channel from a team.

get.description: Retrieve the list of messages in a channel.

post.description: Send a new message to a channel.

get.description: Retrieve a single message from a channel.
List all replies to a message in a channel.

post.description: Send a reply to a message in a channel.

get.description: Get the members of a team.

post.description: Add a new member to a team.

get.description: Get a specific member of a team.

delete.description: Remove a member from a team.

get.description: List all members of a channel.

post.description: Add a member to a private or shared channel.

get.description: Retrieve the list of tabs in a channel.

post.summary: Add a tab to a channel
post.description: Add a tab to a channel in a team.

get.description: List the apps installed in a team.

post.summary: Install an app in a team
post.description: Install an app to a team.

delete.summary: Uninstall an app from a team

get.description: Retrieve the list of chats that the user is part of.

post.description: Create a new one-on-one or group chat.

get.description: List all messages in a chat.

post.description: Send a new message in a chat.
Create an online meeting on behalf of the user.

put.description: Create a new team under an existing Microsoft 365 group.
